## 💬 Teams — Active Conversations

**Legal Change Management channel** — Very active. Jhara shared decks for today's Chelsea intro meeting (~3:28 AM). Eugenia provided detailed slide feedback. No direct action flagged for you but be aware of deck updates and cancelled bi-weekly.

**Service Expansion AI Agent — Workbook chat** (Jhara, Evan Radloff) — Evan responded to Finance Assessment questions: salaried time costs should be captured for pilot costing. This feeds directly into your 11:30 AM Finance call with Bryan.

**Santiago ↔ Jhara DM** — Jhara asked if you sent the email to Laura Rusk confirming the agreement to share operations data once legal guidance is ready. You replied "No" and committed to doing it right away. Status unclear — confirm this was sent.

**Luis Guzman DM** — Luis asked if you are working tomorrow (Friday May 1, Colombian holiday). Worth a quick reply.
